title: antidesma costulatum
intro: Antidesma costulatum, also known as the costulate antidesma, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Antidesma costulatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tonics, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
